_comment: Feed registry for the news collector. This file IS the configuration: the collector code contains no feed URLs and no keywords. To reuse the collector in another project, replace this file (or point NEWS_FEEDS_CONFIG / --feeds-config at your own). shared_keywords gate which feed items get fetched (case-insensitive substring match on title+summary); a feed may add keywords_extra of its own. Formats: rss (RSS 2.0/Atom), json_espn (ESPN site.api JSON), json_arctic_shift (arctic-shift Reddit mirror).
dropped_feeds_log: BBC Sport World Football (feeds.bbci.co.uk/sport/football/world/rss.xml): 404 as of 2026-06-29; general BBC feed covers WC

reddit.com native .rss/.json: 403/429 from datacenter IPs; persists even with the coherent identity pool because it is IP-reputation / rate-limiting, not a fingerprint block. arctic-shift mirror used instead (or Reddit OAuth via REDDIT_CLIENT_ID/_SECRET/_USERNAME/_PASSWORD)
re_enabled_log: ESPN Soccer RSS (www.espn.com/espn/rss/soccer/news) and ESPN article pages: were AWS-WAF 202 JS-challenged under the old impersonate=chrome124 empty-UA pin; re-enabled 2026-07-09 after switching to the coherent identity pool (matching User-Agent + Sec-CH-UA + Accept-Language). Now return 200 with full article bodies; added as source_id espn_rss (the site.api.espn.com JSON feed is kept for targeted WC summaries).

Football.London (?service=rss) and Mirror Football (/sport/football/rss.xml): were 403 during feed selection (whitepaper 11e); re-enabled 2026-07-09 with the coherent identity pool. Added as football_london and mirror_football.
